steps.title: Find the shared characteristic
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between the two books. The notes reveal that both books describe surreal events in otherwise ordinary places—one in suburban neighborhoods, one in urban settings, but both in ordinary locations.

steps.title: Identify which choice highlights this shared pattern
steps.content: D captures their shared pattern by stating that both describe surreal events in ordinary places. The other choices either emphasize differences (A compares story count, C uses “Unlike”) or omit the shared characteristic (B lists only publication dates). That matches choice D — D is correct.
